This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience.

Oda and our selected partners use cookies and similar technologies (together “cookies”) that are necessary to present this website, and to ensure you get the best experience of it. If you consent to it, we will also use cookies for analytics purposes.

See our Cookie Policy to read more about the cookies we set.

You can withdraw and manage your consent at any time, by clicking “Manage cookies” at the bottom of each website page.

Select which cookies you accept

On this site, we always set cookies that are strictly necessary, meaning they are necessary for the site to function properly.

If you consent to it, we will also set other types of cookies. You can provide or withdraw your consent to the different types of cookies using the toggles below. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time, by clicking the link “Manage Cookies”, which is always available at the bottom of the site.

To learn more about what the different types of cookies do, how your data is used when they are set etc, see our Cookie Policy.

These cookies are necessary to make the site work properly, and are always set when you visit the site.

Vendors Teamtailor

These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used.

Operations · Lier

Full-time Driver

We’re looking for more Full-Time Drivers to join us at Lier!

At Oda, we develop affordable grocery services to make the logistics of living surprisingly easy. First, we built Norway’s leading online grocery store, and now, partnered with Mathem in Sweden, we’re on our way to becoming the world’s most effective grocery system, delivering to thousands of Scandinavian doorsteps every week.

As part of our team, you’ll work with smart, passionate colleagues who bring their whole selves to work every day. It’s a fast-paced, collaborative environment where everyone is welcome and every opinion matters. Whether you're shaping the future of online retail, tackling complex logistics challenges, or improving everyday life for our customers, your work will have a real impact. Read on to find out what part you could play in our story.

As a Driver at Oda, you are the face of our company! You’ll be an essential part of our dedicated delivery team, reporting to the Driver Operating Manager and Team Leaders at your site. Your mission? Bringing groceries, smiles, and a little extra convenience directly to our customers’ doorsteps.

What you’ll be doing as a Driver 🚚

  • Be a Customer Hero: You’ll be on the road bringing groceries and smiles directly to our customers, ensuring a top-notch "Oda experience" at every doorstep.

  • Keep the wheels turning: You’ll handle loading and unloading with speed and care, ensuring every box arrives in perfect condition.

  • Own your ride: You’ll take pride in your van, keeping it clean, presentable, and ready for the road.

  • Pay it forward: You’ll help onboard and train new colleagues, sharing your best tips and tricks from the road.

  • Make us better: We value your brain as much as your driving! You’ll contribute your ideas to help us improve our routines and ways of working.

What you’ll need to succeed 🌟

  • A valid driving license (Class B). You’ve had your license for at least 2 years and feel confident and safe behind the wheel.

  • Good communication skills. Comfortable in speaking and writing English. If you also know Norwegian or another Nordic language, that’s a big plus!

What would be nice to have 💡

  • Enjoy being active and thrive in a physically demanding job

  • Comfortable working both independently and as part of a team

  • A strong work ethic and a "can-do" mindset

  • Service-minded and always looking for the best solutions

  • A genuine desire to make our customers happy

  • Responsible and always prioritize safety in traffic

What we offer 🚀

  • A chance to make a real impact in a fast-moving company with a product people love, while shaking up the grocery industry.

  • Teammates who aim high and have each other’s backs. We care about people, and that means supporting each other every step of the way.

  • A flat structure where we team up across disciplines to solve exciting challenges. Big ideas come from everywhere!

  • A transparent way of working. We use Slack to stay in the loop, with fewer meetings and more getting things done.

  • Free access to our on-site gym at Lier, making it easy to fit in a workout!💪

Practical informationℹ️

  • Application deadline: We're actively looking for the right person to join our team, so we’ll be interviewing candidates on a rolling basis. Because we might close the ad early if we find the perfect fit, make sure to get your application in as soon as possible

  • Starting date: We're looking for our next great team member to join us this August, with a planned start in weeks 30, 31 and 32

  • The position is based on a rotational shift schedule (35,5h), with one weekend per month.

  • Working Hours:

    • Morning shift (start between 04:15 and 06:00)

    • Evening shift (start between 12:45 and 14:30)

  • Position: Full-time, 100%

  • Location: Drammensveien 189, 3420 Lierskogen

A few final words

At Oda, you’ll join a passionate, ambitious team working to change the future of grocery shopping. We’re all different—just like you—and we wouldn’t have it any other way. If you need any adjustments or support during the application process, just let us know, and we’ll do our best to help. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and want everyone to have an equal shot at landing the job.

Come build the future of grocery with us! Want to know more about how we work? Check out these posts on Medium.

We can’t wait to hear from you🧡

To ensure a fair and efficient process for everyone, we use Hubert, our virtual assistant, to assist with the initial selection. Keep an eye on your inbox – shortly after applying, you’ll receive an email with an invite to a chat-based interview🤖 Just make sure your email address is correct so the invite finds its way to you!
